author: Rajesh Kumar
comment: Absolutely the best Butter Chicken in Kovur! The Butter Naan was huge, warm, and extremely buttery. Proper authentic taste!

author: Priya Adhikesavan
comment: Nice family atmosphere. The Paneer Butter Masala was very creamy. Clean seating area and quick service.

author: Anand S.
comment: Awesome highway stop! We stopped on our way to Tiruvannamalai. Spicy Pepper Chicken and hot Rotis are highly recommended!

author: Deepika Murugan
comment: Traditional dhaba vibes, outdoor style. Dal Fry was decent, but can get quite crowded on weekends. Good pricing.

author: Karthik Subramaniam
comment: Great food after the temple visit. Fast service and authentic Punjabi taste in Tiruvannamalai.

author: Meera Krishnan
comment: Taste was okay. Mutton Masala was spicy and flavorful. Staff were helpful, but parking was a bit tight.
